title: Search ad CPC trend signals rising pressure on core service keywords
description: Verified March benchmark sources show higher median CPC pressure in core service categories, which reinforces tighter intent targeting and stronger conversion page clarity.

title: Founder persona requests increased for practical CRM follow-up playbooks
description: Discovery conversations and intake forms show repeated demand for simple lead follow-up playbooks, reminder cadence guidance, and low-friction pipeline visibility.

title: New project intake opened for local service lead-to-booking systems
description: Recent intake approvals are centered on projects that connect lead capture, call booking, and basic nurture sequencing for local service providers.

title: Email deliverability guidance emphasizes list quality over send volume
description: Current provider guidance and industry reporting continue to prioritize consent quality, engagement signals, and authentication hygiene over bulk send frequency.

title: Operator and owner personas prioritize visible ROI checkpoints
description: Persona feedback trends consistently favor progress updates tied to booked calls, qualified leads, and practical revenue checkpoints rather than vanity metrics.

title: New project intake accepted for startup launch visibility support
description: Latest onboarding approvals include launch-stage startup projects focused on positioning clarity, landing-page conversion, and first-stage paid traffic testing.
